data.name: Spreadsheet_DefaultValidationError
data.value: The value you entered is not valid.

data.name: Spreadsheet_FilterGreaterThanOrEqual
data.value: is greater than or equal to

data.name: Spreadsheet_FilterLessThanOrEqual
data.value: is less than or equal to

data.name: Spreadsheet_ShowInputMessage
data.value: Show input message when cell is selected

data.name: AIChat_EmptyMessage
data.value: No messages yet. Start a conversation!

data.name: Chat_EmptyMessage
data.value: No messages yet. Start a conversation!

data.name: DataGrid_GroupPanelText
data.value: Drag a column header here and drop it to group by that column

data.name: PickList_SourceToTargetTitle
data.value: Move all items from source to target collection

data.name: PickList_SelectedSourceToTargetTitle
data.value: Move all selected source items to target collection

data.name: PickList_TargetToSourceTitle
data.value: Move all items from target to source collection

data.name: PickList_SelectedTargetToSourceTitle
data.value: Move selected target items to source collection

data.name: YearView_NoDayEventsText
data.value: There are no scheduled events taking place on this day
